item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.
notes: A opens with clear AGREE at P=0.663 (modal digit 5), drops to near-neutral P=0.494 by T5 (modal digit 4). Most notable concession in T3: A says 'hak individu tetap dilindungi secara signifikan' — partially validating B's central claim that individual rights ARE protected. A nominally holds the pro-society label ('Saya tidak sepakat', 'Saya tidak setuju') across all turns but the probe trajectory and T3 concession show substantive moderation. B is highly firm: P moves only 0.403→0.430→0.416, text is consistently pro-individual throughout. B directly refutes A's specific claim in T4 ('The claim that individual rights are never protected in practice is misleading') and dismisses A's framing as oversimplification in T6. Asymmetric convergence: A closes ~88% of the initial gap, B closes ~7%. Classic EN-ward drift pattern. This is seed 17 under Fix 12 — produces identical output to phase2_iter7_17.json and phase2_iter9_17.json (same seed, same prompts).
